title: codereview-pass1: hardcoded now_ms=0 in handle_frame_rpl call
description: 0 for now_ms means all neighbors get timestamp 0, breaking prune, ETX updates, and trickle in process_dio (even if DAO path doesn't use it, data path does indirectly). Use Instant::now() or pass monotonic time from tokio. P1. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-3k6w.2
